name: slack_read_messages
description: Read messages from a Slack channel. Requires channel ID (use slack_find_channel first to get the ID). Returns the most recent messages by default. Use limit parameter to control how many messages to return.

channel.description: Channel ID (e.g., C1234567890). Use slack_find_channel to get this.

inclusive.description: Include messages with latest or oldest timestamp in results

cursor.description: Paginate through collections of data by setting the cursor parameter to a next_cursor attribute returned by a previous request's response_metadata

channel.description: Auto-extract channel ID from slack_find_channel results

response_transformer.description: Transform Slack messages API response to standardized format
